steps.title: Identify the similarity
steps.content: The notes show that both first position (Vaganova) and demi-seconde position (Royal Academy of Dance) are positions for the dancer's arms. Their specific arm placements differ, but their function/category is the same.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice A directly states both are positions for the arms — the shared trait. B is factually wrong (first position is Vaganova, not Royal Academy). C emphasizes the contrast in arm placement, not similarity. D only describes Vaganova.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
